description: Source code for the LinkedModuleService class implementing ILinkedModuleService, handling linked modules operations such as EF source mappings, throughput calculations, and data input management.

classes.name: LinkedModuleService
classes.description: Implements application logic for linked modules, including EF source mappings, throughput calculations, and data input management.

methods.name: GetEfMappingsAsync
methods.description: Retrieves EF source mappings for a given site and asset.

methods.name: UpsertEfMappingsAsync
methods.description: Creates or updates EF source mappings for a site and asset.

methods.name: GetThroughputEquationsAsync
methods.description: Retrieves throughput equations for a site and reporting year.

methods.name: UpsertThroughputEquationsAsync
methods.description: Creates or updates throughput equations for a site and year.

methods.name: GenerateThroughputAsync
methods.description: Generates throughput value for a specific input parameter, site, asset, and year.

methods.name: UpsertDataInputValueAsync
methods.description: Creates or updates data input values.

methods.name: GetCorrelationId
methods.description: Retrieves correlation ID from HTTP context items.
